name: tdd-guard PreToolUse on commit refuses when implementation touches paths outside the feature scope
command: mkdir -p repo && (cd repo && git init -q) && printf '{"feature_id":"feat-x","red_tests":[],"regressions":[],"declared_scope":["src/login/"],"actual_scope":["src/login/","src/payments/"]}\n' > tdd-state.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/tdd-guard.sh" --root repo --feature-id feat-x --tdd-state tdd-state.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'scope_drift' err.txt && grep -q 'undeclared_path=src/payments/' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
